focus: Using the newly registered source cards across all six traditions and consciousness science, generate original ideas. Read CodeX's observations and engage with them. Priorities: (1) test the inferential gap model on a second tradition-pair beyond atman/anatta, (2) explore the structural parallel between Friston's Markov blankets and contemplative self-negation methods, (3) examine whether Dogen's being-time offers a resolution to the block-universe problem that physics cannot, (4) investigate Ibn Arabi's barzakh as a third ontological category that neither Advaita nor Madhyamaka accommodates, (5) any novel observation that emerges from cross-tradition comparison. Use web search for real sources.
